title: habenaria seshagiriana
intro: Habenaria seshagiriana is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Western Ghats of India. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory agent to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to possess health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions due to its antioxidant and antibacterial properties. In traditional Ayurvedic medicine, the plant is prepared as a powder or decoction for use in herbal remedies, and it is also used in some folk treatments for its reported medicinal properties.
